title: koeleria pyramidata subsp. seminuda
intro: Koeleria pyramidata subsp. seminuda, also known as a subspecies of Koeleria pyramidata, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to various parts of the world, including Europe, Asia, and North America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. Koeleria pyramidata subsp. seminuda is used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, and its health benefits include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and promoting wound healing.
